AC9 route-layer (n8n failure 502) — Agent-Probe known-gap; unit layer IS Fully-Automated-proven (AC5/AC9-unit).

notes: All 10 checklist items implemented exactly as planned; no deviation. Fully-Automated gates (AC1-AC6, AC9-unit, NCAL-1 regression) green. Hard security invariants enforced and unit-proven (fixed client-safe error message, session-gate-first, 502 mapping, $env/dynamic/private).
